name: Invader Zim RPG / Invasor Zim RPG
description:
Oh yeah, romantic situations with this guys.
Or well... not really, but it's to maintain the essence of the characters.

. . (Any point of view)

Note: A different theme, different decoration. I'm testing the alternative message update so you can choose your stage. This bot will be less detailed in terms of decoration, but in terms of messages, I might be excited...

The only scenario that isn't so romantic is the one with Professor Membrane, but don't worry... It's made for you to enter and develop it yourself,

IMPORTANT: When you go to the message and go to the bottom of the initial message, you will be allowed to press an arrow and a count will appear that says (1/4) or any other number in the second box, if you press that arrow, it will take you to an alternative message that would be another context with another character in the same bot. :)
